subject: warp not starting
body:
I have installed warp 1.0.7 and it crashes immediately upon starting.  it 
gives this error:


It then tells me to reinstall things, which i have done numerous times, and 
it doesn't change anything.  1.0.6 will at least open the window, but it 
crashes after asking to start processing anything.  I am on Win10 and have 
a Titan Xp

Regards,
mike
